name: 池畔追思 Poolcore Reflection
short_description: Pool core games. Explore the open pool core, find all the ducks, and unlock new scenes. Relaxing sound effects, no ghost elements, short process, produced by a 15 year old junior high school student alone.
detailed_description:
statement

This was originally a free experimental game, and only a few players may be interested. You can find the free version on the author's Bilibili homepage or in Q group 743353735. Please carefully distinguish and be careful not to download malicious software bundles or virus plugins on pirated websites.


About the Game

Game features: PoolCore Explore the open pool core, find all the ducks, and unlock new scenes More than 5 large-scale swimming pool scenes in total, with the final level containing tower climbing gameplay Relaxing Sound Effects No ghost elements Short process Produced by a 15-year-old junior high school student alone Possible challenges: Some simple puzzles Contains dark scenes Light sensitivity, claustrophobia, hydrophobia, and... getting lost? Action: WASD move, C squat, SHIFT run, space jump, right-click flashlight.
